title: AI: The New Powerhouse in Formula One Racing
description: Artificial intelligence has significantly influenced Liberty Media's Formula One. With eight AI partnerships in the past six months, teams like Williams and Red Bull leverage AI for strategic advantages. The increasing AI presence boosts team efficiency, aids in navigating new regulations, and enhances decision-making in on-track situations.
